coalitions: C5 status-quo bloc (KAZ-UZB-KGZ-TJK) closing ranks around a non-binding drought/de-escalation framework
KAZ-led drafting group with UZB and KGZ backing
note: The drought shock pushed the four Central Asian states into a defensive, KAZ-led framework on de-escalation and water coordination, but low mediator pressure and a merely neutral mood left everyone's sovereignty and structural red lines untouched, so no binding comprehensive settlement emerged and outside powers (RUS, CHN, IND) were left jockeying for future bilateral leverage.
